name: create-channel-scoped-reminders-crons
description: Create, list, and cancel reminders and cron jobs scoped to the channel they were requested from. Use when: user says 'remind me', 'set an alarm', 'schedule a cron', 'alert me when', 'every day at X do Y', 'cancel my reminder', 'list my reminders'. Auto-detects source channel and…
author: community
